---
title: "ACS Aug. 2024"
description: "Presentation on Climate Accountability as held at ACS 2024"
---

```{=html}
<iframe src="https://julianbarg.github.io/public_documents/presentations/2024-08-19_jb_ACS_slides.pdf" width="100%" style="height:90vh; border:none;"></iframe>
```

Presentation with some focus on ESG.
